description: Style Noteallen solly was formed in 1744 in Nottingham, England. Their handbags are creatively engineered to cater to the woman of today. Make a style statement effortlessly with this simply silhouetted leatherette handbag. With a long adjustable handle and classy stitch detailing, this bag in white and brown makes a fabulous combination of style and practicality.Product DetailsHas one roomy zipped compartment, with organiser sleeves, an inner zipped compartmentOne small zipped pocket on the front for enhanced spaceOne long adjustable handle for carrying ease and styleBrand name embossed on a small placard looped through the metallic loop on the handleMaterial and CareLeatheretteWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustSizeHeight: 25 cmWidth: 37 cmDepth: 13 cm
